Package org.areslib.math.controller

Class TrapezoidProfile

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.math.controller.TrapezoidProfile
public class TrapezoidProfile extends Object
A standalone trapezoidal motion profile generator, decoupled from any PID controller.

Generates smooth motion with configurable maximum velocity and acceleration constraints. The profile produces position and velocity setpoints at each timestep that respect kinematic limits, allowing mechanisms to accelerate, cruise, and decelerate smoothly.

Usage: Call calculate(double) each loop iteration with a fixed dt to advance the profile. Use the returned TrapezoidProfile.State to feed a PID controller, feedforward, or directly drive open-loop mechanisms. 


 TrapezoidProfile profile = new TrapezoidProfile(
     new TrapezoidProfile.Constraints(maxVel, maxAccel),
     new TrapezoidProfile.State(targetPos, 0),  // goal
     new TrapezoidProfile.State(currentPos, 0)   // initial
 );

 // In periodic():
 State setpoint = profile.calculate(0.02);  // 20ms dt
 motor.setPower(pid.calculate(encoder.getPosition(), setpoint.position));

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    TrapezoidProfile.Constraints
    Kinematic constraints for the profile.
    static class 
    TrapezoidProfile.State
    A state along the profile (position + velocity at a point in time).

  • Constructor Details

    • TrapezoidProfile

      public TrapezoidProfile(TrapezoidProfile.Constraints constraints, TrapezoidProfile.State goal, TrapezoidProfile.State initial)
      Constructs a new TrapezoidProfile.
      Parameters:
      constraints - The velocity and acceleration constraints.
      goal - The desired end state.
      initial - The starting state.

    • TrapezoidProfile

      public TrapezoidProfile(TrapezoidProfile.Constraints constraints, TrapezoidProfile.State goal)
      Constructs a profile that starts from rest.
      Parameters:
      constraints - The velocity and acceleration constraints.
      goal - The desired end state.

  • Method Details

    • calculate

      public TrapezoidProfile.State calculate(double dt)
      Advances the profile by the given time delta and returns the new state.
      Parameters:
      dt - The time step in seconds (typically 0.02 for a 50Hz loop).
      Returns:
      The profiled state at the new time.

    • getState

      public TrapezoidProfile.State getState()
      Returns the current state of the profile.
      Returns:
      The current state.

    • getGoal

      public TrapezoidProfile.State getGoal()
      Returns the goal state.
      Returns:
      The goal state.

    • isFinished

      public boolean isFinished()
      Returns true if the profile has reached the goal state.
      Returns:
      true if finished, false otherwise.
